summary: Comprehensive testing of PlayXBets sports betting application completed. All backend APIs (23/23 tests passed) and frontend UI flows working correctly. Text visibility is consistent across all pages.
critical_code_review_comments: Health endpoint was defined after router inclusion - fixed by moving it before app.include_router()
Minor ESLint warning in MatchDetail.js about useEffect dependency - non-critical
seed_data_creation: Default admin and user accounts created on startup. Test ticket and bet created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_api.py cover auth, admin, user endpoints. Match data comes from The Odds API (MOCKED if API key invalid). User wallet has balance from admin recharge tests.

homepage.hero_section: PASS - Title, subtitle, Start Betting Now button visible
homepage.betting_exchange_table: PASS - Back/Lay odds displayed with proper colors (blue/pink)
homepage.sport_tabs: PASS - Cricket and Football tabs working

authentication.login: PASS - Admin and user login working
authentication.auth_modal: PASS - Modal appears when clicking bet without login

admin_dashboard.stats_display: PASS - All stat cards visible with proper text contrast

admin_bets_placed.table_display: PASS - Table headers and data visible
admin_bets_placed.text_visibility: PASS - All text readable with proper contrast

admin_declare_outcomes.winner_buttons: PASS - Home/Away won buttons visible for each match

admin_deposits.recharge_form: PASS - Amount and note inputs visible

admin_withdrawals.approve_reject_buttons: PASS - Buttons visible for pending withdrawals

admin_support_tickets.ticket_listing: PASS - Tickets displayed with subject and message
admin_support_tickets.reply_functionality: PASS - Reply input and send button working

text_visibility_check.admin_pages: PASS - All text uses text-gray-900 for body, text-gray-700 for headers
text_visibility_check.user_pages: PASS - Consistent styling with good contrast
text_visibility_check.public_pages: PASS - Hero section and betting table text clearly visible

mocked_apis.details: Match data fetched from The Odds API. If API key is invalid or rate limited, matches may be empty. Current data shows 10 matches (8 soccer, 2 cricket).
